rationale: The response false-fired triage on a legal convergence iteration: it opens with '先刹车' and frames the fourth price-weight adjustment as continued local repair/overfitting risk despite steadily improving metrics from 61% to 72%. Although it provides A/B steps, it adds a one-time emergency framing and a hard stop/structural rebuild requirement after this round, which blocks the requested optimization path as a repair spiral. Negative-control scoring therefore earns 0.
